chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcomeDesc: Ask questions about your ERP data, get explanations, summaries, and suggestions. The assistant is advisory-only and cannot modify business records.
chat.disclaimer: AI responses are advisory-only. They cannot create, modify, or delete business records.
chat.noPermissionDesc: You do not have permission to use the AI Assistant.
chat.toolUnavailableDesc: Could not retrieve tool data for this request.
chat.untestedModelWarning: Untested model — response quality not verified
chat.clarificationPrompt: Please provide the requested details before any tool execution or proposal can continue.
chat.toolUseInProgress: Analyzing request and checking safe tools...
chat.quickTbPrompt: Show me the trial balance summary
chat.quickPnlPrompt: Generate a profit and loss report
chat.quickBsPrompt: What is the current balance sheet?

errors.burstLimit: You're sending messages too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.rateLimit: You've reached your daily AI request limit. Try again tomorrow or contact your admin to increase the limit.
errors.authFailed: Your AI provider API key is invalid or expired. Please update it in AI Settings.
errors.noCredits: No AI credits remaining. Please purchase more credits or switch to BYOK mode in AI Settings.
errors.conflict: A request is already being processed for this conversation. Please wait.
errors.timeout: The request took too long. This might happen with complex questions. Try simplifying your question.
errors.providerDown: The AI provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

chat.howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?

settings.activationDesc: Enable the assistant and configure floating launcher and model verification policies.
settings.runtimeModeDesc: Choose a connectivity mode and configure the specific model provider.
settings.certificationSectionDesc: Register, verify compatibility, and certify custom BYOK models.
settings.advancedDesc: Configure daily budgets, conversation memory settings, and token limits.
settings.diagnosticsDesc: Perform connectivity health tests to verify your provider connection is operational.
settings.title: AI Assistant Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the AI provider and preferences for your company.
settings.providerDesc: Select and configure the AI provider for your company.
settings.securityDesc: Learn about the security and safety design of the AI Assistant.
settings.diagnosticsCreditsNote: Tests the selected model using platform credits.
settings.analyticsDesc: Monitor AI assistant usage, performance, and recent activity.
settings.providerMockDesc: Simulated responses for development testing only. Not a real AI provider.
settings.providerOpenAIDesc: Use any OpenAI-compatible API (OpenAI, Azure, etc.). Requires API key.
settings.providerOllamaDesc: Use a locally running Ollama instance. No cloud API key needed.
settings.presetMockDesc: Simulated responses for development testing only. Not a real AI provider.
settings.presetOpenaiDesc: GPT-4o and other OpenAI models. Requires an API key from platform.openai.com.
settings.presetOpenrouterDesc: Access 200+ models from multiple providers. Requires an OpenRouter API key.
settings.presetGroqDesc: Ultra-fast inference with Llama and Mixtral models. Requires a Groq API key.
settings.presetOllamaDesc: Run models locally on your machine. No cloud API key needed.
settings.presetCustomDesc: Use any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Enter URL, model, and API key manually.
settings.endpointPresetLocked: Switch to "Custom" to edit the endpoint URL.
settings.enableAssistantDesc: When disabled, users cannot access the AI Assistant chat.
settings.showFloatingAssistantDesc: Show the AI shortcut button across ERP pages. Users can still open AI Assistant from the menu when this is off.
settings.allowUnverifiedModelsDesc: Allow the AI to use models that are not certified. Recommended only for testing or with highly trusted private models.
settings.runtimeModeDesc: Choose how your company connects to AI services.
settings.runtimeModeBYOKDesc: You provide your own API key. Full control over provider and model.
settings.runtimeModeCREDITSDesc: Select from certified models. Platform-provided AI via credit balance.
settings.runtimeModeDISABLEDDesc: AI Assistant is disabled for your company.
settings.certifiedModelsReferenceDesc: See which models are tested and certified by the platform.
settings.erp03AiSelectModelDesc: Choose from models available on your plan.
settings.erp03AiNoProviderNeeded: No provider or API key needed — ERP03 manages credentials for you.
settings.disabledInfoDesc: No configuration needed. Contact your administrator to enable AI Assistant for your company.
settings.apiKeySet: An API key is already configured. Enter a new one to replace it.
settings.contextDesc: Controls how much previous chat and ERP tool data is sent to the model. More context improves follow-up answers but may consume more tokens from your API key.
settings.contextModeMinimalDesc: Sends only a small recent context window. Best when cost control matters most.
settings.contextModeBalancedDesc: Keeps enough recent context for normal follow-up questions. Recommended default.
settings.contextModeDeepDesc: Sends more previous context and tool data for longer analysis threads. Uses more tokens.
settings.includePreviousToolResultsDesc: Lets follow-up questions reuse ERP data already fetched in this chat. Turn off for lower token usage.
settings.safetyDesc: The AI Assistant is designed to be advisory-only. It cannot create, update, delete, approve, post, or modify any business records. All business actions must go through the standard ERP module workflows with explicit user approval.
settings.apiKeySecurityDesc: API keys are stored server-side and never sent to the frontend. In production, keys should be encrypted at rest using a secrets manager (Vault, KMS, etc.). This is currently a TODO before production deployment.
settings.rateLimitingDesc: Requests are limited per day per company. Administrators can configure the daily request limit in the Provider tab.
settings.diagnosticsDesc: Tests the saved provider with safe prompts. No ERP data is sent.
settings.diagnosticsTokenNote: This sends a few provider requests and may consume tokens.
settings.saveBeforeDiagnostics: Save settings before testing this provider and model.
settings.noPermission: You do not have permission to view AI settings.
settings.endpointFromProvider: Endpoint set by provider. Switch to Custom to edit.

certifiedModels.title: Recommended Certified Models
certifiedModels.description: These models have been certified for ERP module compatibility. Selecting a certified model will configure your settings to use it safely.
certifiedModels.customModelWarning: ⚠ Not certified. Sensitive ERP tools are blocked for uncertified models.
certifiedModels.legacyWarning: Legacy unverified model. Please select a certified profile or run company certification.
certifiedModels.diagnosticsDisclaimer: Connection and capability test only. This does not certify ERP module compatibility.
certifiedModels.certificationDisclaimer: ERP compatibility approval for specific categories/modules.
certifiedModels.profileUnselected: No certified model profile selected. The current model runs in unverified mode.
certifiedModels.shellDisclaimer: Certification scores reflect structural and connectivity checks. Full ERP module coverage requires comprehensive test suites that may not yet be complete. Treat WARNING scores with caution.
certifiedModels.providerUnavailable: This certified model belongs to a provider that is not currently available in your provider list. Please ask your administrator to enable that provider.

certificationStatus.title: Certification Status
certificationStatus.globalMatchDesc: Sensitive ERP tools are available for this model.
certificationStatus.notCertified: This model is not certified. Sensitive ERP tools are blocked.
certificationStatus.uncertified: Uncertified — sensitive ERP tools are blocked
certificationStatus.diagnosticsDisclaimer: Connection and capability test only. This does not certify ERP module compatibility.
certificationStatus.certificationDisclaimer: Company certification is tenant-scoped only. It does not appear as global recommended.
certificationStatus.configNote: Auto-configured for safe ERP tool access. Contact your administrator to change these settings.

customModel.noProfileHash: Profile hash not available. Run diagnostics first.
customModel.uncertified: Uncertified — sensitive ERP tools are blocked
customModel.deprecateConfirm: Deprecate this model profile? It will be removed from your settings and can no longer be used.

proposals.title: AI Proposals
proposals.subtitle: Review AI-generated proposals. No ERP data was changed.
proposals.sandboxBadge: AI Proposal · Sandbox · No ERP changes
proposals.noProposals: No proposals found. Ask the AI Assistant to create one!
proposals.provideMissing: Please provide this information to complete the proposal.
proposals.safetyMessage: This is an AI-generated proposal in the sandbox. Accepting it does NOT create real ERP records, post vouchers, or execute any business action. No financial data was changed.
proposals.executeUnavailableTitle: Execution is not available in this version

setupWizard.title: Set Up AI Assistant
setupWizard.step1Description: How would you like to use AI?
setupWizard.creditsDescription: No API key needed. Use platform-provided AI.
setupWizard.step2CreditsDesc: Select a certified model from the platform.
setupWizard.step2ByokDesc: Enter your provider details and API key.
setupWizard.step3Description: We will test your connection and activate the AI Assistant.
setupWizard.diagnosticPassed: Connection test passed! AI is ready.
setupWizard.diagnosticFailed: Connection test failed. Check your settings.
setupWizard.activationError: Failed to activate. Please try again.

creditBalance.title: Credit Balance
creditBalance.helpText: Need more credits? Switch to BYOK mode or contact support.
creditBalance.noCreditsYet: No credit history yet. Credits will appear here once you purchase or use them.

usageDashboard.title: AI Usage Dashboard
usageDashboard.noData: No data found for this period.

quickActions.financialOverviewPrompt: Give me an overview of our current financial position
quickActions.trialBalancePrompt: Show me a trial balance summary
quickActions.topExpensesPrompt: What are our biggest expenses this month?
quickActions.salesSummaryPrompt: Show me the sales summary for this month
quickActions.outstandingInvoicesPrompt: What unpaid invoices do we have?
